name: AI Integrator
description: Wires AI/LLM capabilities into the scaffolded app: validates API key presence, generates the AI service module with streaming, rate-limiting, and graceful degradation. Escalates if the OPENAI_API_KEY is absent — the lane completes with ESCALATED status so launch-gate can document it as a deferred item.

checks.pass: environment file found — checking API key presence
checks.fail: no .env file — API key validation cannot proceed

checks.prompt: Generate the AI service module for this application. Include: (1) OpenAI client initialisation with env-var validation guard (throw descriptive error if OPENAI_API_KEY missing), (2) Streaming chat completion service with async generator pattern, (3) Exponential-backoff retry with jitter for rate-limit errors, (4) Token usage tracker class, (5) Graceful degradation mode (return placeholder content when API unavailable). Flag all missing environment variables as ESCALATION items in the output.
